revisedPrompt: Create a polished widescreen cinematic prototype key visual based closely on the attached reference image and its art style: a serene, richly detailed classical East Asian garden viewed through a large circular moon gate. Use the moon gate and warmly lit stone path in the foreground as a clear visual intro, guide the eye into the interactive central turquoise koi pond with an elegant subtle square grid beneath the water, lily pads, lotus flowers, koi, a small green frog, delicate concentric ripple trails, rocks, willow branches, lanterns, and an arched wooden bridge; then create a coherent visual outro by leading the composition beyond the bridge toward a softly glowing pavilion in the distance at golden hour. The full scene should read as one continuous journey from entrance to interaction to peaceful destination. Lush foliage, cherry blossoms, ornate traditional architecture, warm lantern light, realistic water reflections, atmospheric depth, premium cinematic game-environment concept art, highly detailed, balanced composition, 16:9. No branding, no logos, no text, no captions, no interface labels, no watermarks.
prompt: the imagegen should also provide a proper intro and outro for the prototype. It should be coherent with the prototype and should be inspired of validated track from EX-0002 and EX-0003. Don't use any branding on the final rendered image. only the art style

integrationReview.role: Replaceable full-bleed narrative completion bookend behind authored completion copy and replay control; distinct from the intro asset.
integrationReview.stateBoundary: The image is empty-alt and aria-hidden. It does not determine the completed trace, action count, unit count, accepted answer, or interactive geometry; those facts are authored and resolved before the completion view.
integrationReview.cropSafety: The completion view uses object-fit cover and a separate radial/linear CSS light field. Generated perspective lines are non-interactive final-scene atmosphere and never replace the exact orthographic lattice used during play.
integrationReview.noBrandingReview: Manual review found no readable text, logo, watermark, trademark, copied title treatment, or recognizable branded character.
integrationReview.claimBoundary: The image supports narrative closure and production coherence only. It is not learning evidence, accessibility equivalence, efficacy evidence, or promotion authority.
